queries.compiledQueryString: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM products ORDER BY department
queries.inputQueryString: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM products ORDER BY department

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.name,
  p.brand,
  p.category,
  ROUND(p.retail_price, 2) AS retail_price,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS units_sold
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
  AND p.department = '${inputs.department}'
  AND LOWER(p.brand) LIKE '%' || LOWER('${inputs.brand_search}') || '%'
  AND p.retail_price >= ${inputs.min_price}
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'
GROUP BY p.name, p.brand, p.category, p.retail_price
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  p.name,
  p.brand,
  p.category,
  ROUND(p.retail_price, 2) AS retail_price,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS units_sold
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
  AND p.department = '${inputs.department}'
  AND LOWER(p.brand) LIKE '%' || LOWER('${inputs.brand_search}') || '%'
  AND p.retail_price >= ${inputs.min_price}
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'
GROUP BY p.name, p.brand, p.category, p.retail_price
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.brand) AS brands,
  COUNT(*) AS units_sold
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
  AND p.department = '${inputs.department}'
  AND LOWER(p.brand) LIKE '%' || LOWER('${inputs.brand_search}') || '%'
  AND p.retail_price >= ${inputs.min_price}
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC

  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(oi.created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
  AND p.department = '${inputs.department}'
  AND LOWER(p.brand) LIKE '%' || LOWER('${inputs.brand_search}') || '%'
  AND p.retail_price >= ${inputs.min_price}
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(oi.created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
  AND p.department = '${inputs.department}'
  AND LOWER(p.brand) LIKE '%' || LOWER('${inputs.brand_search}') || '%'
  AND p.retail_price >= ${inputs.min_price}
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) BETWEEN '${inputs.order_date.start}' AND '${inputs.order_date.end}'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
